title: Export to Aard2 Slob format
body:
Greetings Venerable,

I would like to request the addition of Slob format, itkach/slob - https://github.com/itkach/slob . It is useful for mobile use with Aard2 (https://github.com/itkach/aard2-android) , a completely open source dictionary application. It is also supported by pyglossary, https://github.com/ilius/pyglossary/blob/master/doc/p/aard2_slob.md, as well.

Thank you for the consideration,
Leonardo
